metricDefinitions.defaultBranchCommits: Commit contributions GitHub reports on default branches, filtered to repositories whose nameWithOwner starts with openclaw/.
metricDefinitions.prBranchCommits: Commit totals on pull requests authored by the viewer in org:openclaw for the selected date range.
metricDefinitions.pullRequestsOpen: Authored OpenClaw pull requests whose current state is OPEN.
metricDefinitions.pullRequestsMerged: Authored OpenClaw pull requests whose current state is MERGED.
metricDefinitions.pullRequestsClosed: Authored OpenClaw pull requests whose current state is CLOSED without merge.
metricDefinitions.issuesOpened: Issues authored by the viewer in org:openclaw for the selected date range.
metricDefinitions.reviews: Pull request review contributions GitHub reports, filtered to openclaw/ repositories.
metricDefinitions.issueComments: Issue comments authored by the viewer on OpenClaw issues returned by GitHub search.
